calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Franceschini for petitioner Hiram Woo; Ronald Foreman for Ronald Lachman.

Mr. Foreman requested that the matter be continued for 30 days to give him time to file an objection or other response to the petition. Mr. Franceschini stated he may have an issue of the objector's standing to object. The Court stated that he was not going to deal with the standing issue today, but that he was willing to grant a continuance to allow the filing of the objection, and set January 8, 2016 as the deadline for the filing and service of any such objection. The Court raised the further issue that the petition was seeking to establish that LLCs were part of the trust, where it appeared the LLC's may hold assets other than a share in the property placed in the trust under the attachment to the trust agreement. The matter was continued to January 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
